commands.purpose: Validate Linux setup documentation, fixtures, and contract drift.
commands.structured_exit_behavior: 0 when all contract checks pass; 1 with per-field failures when drift is detected

commands.purpose: Record a Manual Auth blocker packet without attempting provider login.
commands.structured_exit_behavior: 0 when blocker packet is written; 1 when required fields or redaction checks fail

commands.purpose: Install approved browser dependency packages after bounded host-package-install authority.
commands.evidence_output: dry-run preview, requested package list, and post-verify result
commands.structured_exit_behavior: 0 when packages and post-verify pass; non-zero typed failure before retry guidance

expected_reason: Commands define id, purpose, cwd, argv, timeout, authority, writes, evidence, structured exits, failure type, closed stdin, and non-interactive execution.
